upgrade: V9 seed protocol production implementation contract

validation.lane_command: cargo test --manifest-path core/layer0/ops/Cargo.toml v9_seed_protocol_integration -- --nocapture && cargo test --manifest-path core/layer0/ops/Cargo.toml seed_protocol -- --nocapture && cargo run --quiet --manifest-path core/layer0/ops/Cargo.toml --bin protheus-ops -- seed-protocol status
validation.status_command: cargo run --quiet --manifest-path core/layer0/ops/Cargo.toml --bin protheus-ops -- seed-protocol status
